nodes.itemHTML: • yadm - Seamless git-based management of your dotfiles.
• shell2httpstars755 - HTTP-server to execute shell commands. Designed for development, prototyping or remote control.
• hyperlearnstars1.2k - 50%+ Faster, 50%+ less RAM usage, GPU support re-written Sklearn, Statsmodels.
• Fisherstars4.9k - Package manager for the fish shell.
• GNOME Terminal - Terminal emulator for GNOME.
• Terminusstars17.7k - Cross-platform terminal for a more modern age, based on web technologies.
• Tildastars1k - Gtk based drop down terminal for Linux and Unix.
• drystars2.3k - Docker manager for the terminal.
• glancesstars18.3k - top/htop alternative.
• zstars13.1k - Tool to jump to folders based on history matching a given regex
• z.luastars2k - New cd command that helps you navigate faster by learning your habits.
• awesome-emacsstars6.5k - Community driven list of useful Emacs packages, libraries and others.
• kstars1.5k - Directory listings for zsh with git features.
• GNU Screen - Full-screen window manager that multiplexes a physical terminal between several processes.
• masstars8.1k - Mac App Store command line interface.
• Knowage - open source business intelligence platform. (former SpagoBi)
• London Creative Coding Meetup - Bimonthly meetup aiming to gather like minded creatives from all backgrounds.
• Visualising Data London - Bimonthly meetup for people who design, write code, draw or like to think about data visualisation.
• Encode - 2 day data viz conference. (September)
• EMF Camp - Camping festival for hackers, artists, geeks, crafters, scientists, and engineers. (July)
• Interactive storytelling Meetup - For everyone working with, or interested in, interactive and/or digital storytelling.
• The Next Web - Europe's largest tech festival. (June)
• Grow - The first parisian event dedicated to advanced creative coding. (November)
• Creative Code Berlin Meetup - Diverse community of people interested in the use of computing skills for artistic expression.
• Mutek Barcelona - Electronic music and the digital arts festival. (March)
• Digital Design Days - 3 day event for the digital design industry. (October)
• Mutek Montréal - Electronic music and the digital arts festival. (March)
• FITC Toronto - 3 day celebration of the best the world has to offer in design, web development, media and innovation in creative technologies. (April)
• Eyeo Festival - Festival for Artists, data designers, creative coders, AI explorers, storytellers, tool & platform developers, and researchers all. (June)
• Mutek Mexico - Electronic music and the digital arts festival. (November)
• Mutek Buenos Aires - Electronic music and the digital arts festival. (September)
• Mutek Tokyo - Electronic music and the digital arts festival. (December)
• neural-style-ptstars508 - A PyTorch implementation of Justin Johnson's neural-style (neural style transfer).
• spaCy - Industrial-Strength Natural Language Processing.

• AlloyCIstars274 - AlloyCI is a Continuous Integration, Deployment, and Delivery coordinator, written in Elixir, that takes advantage of the GitLab CI Runner, and its capabilities as executor, to prepare and run your pipelines.
• Jisho-Elixirstars20 - An API wrapper for Jisho.org, an online Japanese dictionary. Allows users to search by word, symbol, and or tags (refer to docs).
• medusastars3 - Elixir static site generator that supports Pug.
• epub_cover_extractorstars4 - Extract cover from EPUB files.
• conektastars14 - Elixir wrapper for Conekta API.
• CaptainFactstars153 - A collaborative, real-time video fact-checking platform. (Docs).
• Exonstars22 - A “mess manager” developed in Elixir and provides a simple API to manage & document your stuff. (Docs).
• medusa_serverstars5 - A simple cowboy web server written in Elixir to stack images. (Docs).
• Exnnstars94 - Evolutive Neural Networks framework à la G.Sher written in Elixir. (Docs).
• Neat-Ex - An Elixir implementation of the NEAT algorithm. (Docs).
• coherencestars1.2k - Coherence is a full featured, configurable authentication system for Phoenix. (Docs).
• guardianstars3.1k - An authentication framework for use with Elixir applications. (Docs).
• canarystars448 - An authorization library for Elixir applications that restricts what resources the current user is allowed to access. (Docs).
• terminatorstars48 - Database based authorization (ACL), with custom DSL rules for requiring needed permissions. (Docs).
• hedwigstars609 - XMPP Client/Bot Framework for Elixir.(Docs).
• erlcloudstars637 - Cloud Computing library for Erlang (Amazon EC2, S3, SQS, SimpleDB, Mechanical Turk, ELB). (Docs).
• libclusterstars1.3k - Automatic cluster formation/healing for Elixir applications.(Docs).
• credostars3.9k - A static code analysis tool with a focus on code consistency and teaching Elixir. (Docs).
• dialyxirstars1.3k - Mix tasks to simplify use of Dialyzer in Elixir projects.(Docs).
• dogmastars474 - A code style linter for Elixir, powered by shame.(Docs).
• cloakstars425 - Cloak makes it easy to use encryption with Ecto.(Docs).
• comeoninstars1.2k - Password hashing (argon2, bcrypt, pbkdf2_sha512) library for Elixir.(https://hexdocs.pm/comeonin/api-reference.html).
• ex_cryptostars91 - Elixir wrapper for Erlang crypto and public_key modules. Provides sensible defaults for many crypto functions to make them easier to use.(Docs).
• ExGramstars103 - a library to build Telegram Bots, you can use the low-level methods and models or use the really opinionated framework included. (Docs).
• access passstars73 - Authentication framework that can be used with or outside of phoenix. Similar to Addict but geared towards API usage.(Docs).

• ress - Modern CSS reset.
    Repostars1.6k | #CSS
• quantumstars1.8k - Cron-like job scheduler for Elixir applications.
• aztarnastars82 - A footprinting tool for robots.
• ros2_fuzzerstars11 - ROS2 Topic & Service Fuzzer.
• containerstars179 - A powerful IoC Container with fluent and easy-to-use interface.
• Shaders (HLSL, GLSL, Cg)
• Nishangstars5.2k - Enables scripting for red team, penetration testing, and offensive security.

• The Quantum Internet and Quantum Computers: How Will They Change the World? - Learn the principles and promises behind developments in quantum computers and quantum internet and how they will impact our future.
• Understanding Quantum Computers - Introduction to the key concepts of quantum computing with minimal mathematics.
